Restake now

Restaking for everyone

Karak is the universal restaking layer powered by the entire cryptoeconomy across every asset and every chain.

Restake nowLearn more

Stakers

Karak makes it easy to provide cryptoeconomic security with any asset and earn boosted yield on any asset by earning network fees on top of your asset's native utility.

Operators

Karak allows for node operators to run validation software on Karak to secure more networks with more assets, enabling maximal capital efficiency with minimal overhead.

Developers

Karak enables builders to tap into robust and secure trust networks from day one, making the process of bootstrapping security more scalable, accessible, and affordable.

Secured by a global decentralized network of trust

Karak leverages a global network of decentralized trust, introducing a unique, universal marketplace where stakers and developers converge to spark innovation and secure the next wave of novel applications together.

Left-click: rotate, Mouse-wheel/middle-click: zoom, Right-click: pan

Universal security

Karak introduces multiasset restaking, a new primitive in cryptoeconomic security allowing users to provide universal security in exchange for boosted rewards. Multiasset restaking also supercharges security for chains, protocols, and other decentralized infrastructure layers within the Ethereum ecosystem and beyond.

Get started

Infinite innovation

Karak fosters an environment of infinite innovation by providing developers with universal access to trust networks, which enables an endless creation of novel applications, protocols, and services. Get in touch with the team today to start building.

Get in touch

Explore the ecosystem

Zero to One systems are being developed on Karak every day. Discover and explore cutting-edge web services, networks, protocols, and applications being built within the Karak ecosystem.

KUDA

Karak Universal Data Availability, KUDA, is the first DA marketplace designed to seamlessly connect rollups with any DA layer.

Wormhole

Wormhole is the leading interoperability platform that facilitates the secure transfer of arbitrary messages across chains.

Space and Time

Space and Time is the first decentralized data warehouse that delivers sub-second ZK proofs against onchain and offchain data.

Explore one of the fastest growing ecosystems in the industry. Build the future of web services.

Explore

Get started

Everything you need to get started on Karak.
